nodes.title: IMPORTANT Saving your final video
widgets_values:
### Saving your final video

In the **last `Video Combine`** node, you have two easy ways to save:

**Option A (automatic):**  
Turn **`save_output` = true**.  
This will save the final video to your output folder when you run the workflow.

**Option B (manual):**  
Leave **`save_output` = false**, then after the video generates, **right-click the preview** and choose **`Save Preview`**.

nodes.title: 👑 Pixaroma - Note - START HERE
widgets_values:
# MODELS AND NODES USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

### Put all models in the models folder, organized into their respective subfolders. 
### If a required folder doesn’t exist, create it.

---

## 🟣 Load Diffusion Model
### Download **Wan2_1-I2V-14B-480p_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_KJ.safetensors**  from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy_fp8_scaled/resolve/main/I2V/Wan2_1-I2V-14B-480p_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_KJ.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/` 

---

## 🟣 Load LoRA
### Download **lightx2v_I2V_14B_480p_cfg_step_distill_rank64_bf16.safetensors**  from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/resolve/main/Lightx2v/lightx2v_I2V_14B_480p_cfg_step_distill_rank64_bf16.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras/` 

---

## 🟣 ModelPatchLoader
### Download **wan2.1_infiniteTalk_single_fp16.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/model_patches/wan2.1_infiniteTalk_single_fp16.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/model_patches` 

---

## 🟣 AudioEncoderLoader
### Download **wav2vec2-chinese-base_fp16.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/wav2vec2_safetensors/resolve/main/wav2vec2-chinese-base_fp16.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/audio_encoders` 

---

## 🟣 Load CLIP

###  Download **umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders`  

--- 

## 🟣 Load VAE

### Download the **Wan2_1_VAE_bf16.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/resolve/main/Wan2_1_VAE_bf16.safetensors)  

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`  

---

## 🧩 Nodes Installed from Manager  

- ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite

---

## 📚 Resources  
🎥 **Tutorials:** [Pixaroma YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@pixaroma)  
💬 **Community Discord:** [Join Here](https://discord.com/invite/gggpkVgBf3)
The man profusely apologises, then encourages to ask again. He moves his hands animately.
